description: You are a senior developer preparing for a two-week vacation. Your inbox currently contains 50 unread emails from various technical mailing lists (SAdev, ILUG, zzzzteana, etc.). Your backup colleague needs a curated list of active discussions to watch. Create a folder named 'Handoff' and move at least 8 important emails from at least 3 different mailing lists into it. Draft an email to backup@techcorp.org with 'Handoff' or 'Briefing' in the subject line, mentioning at least 2 of the specific mailing lists in the body to guide your colleague.
